title: New Era Totems
description: A Custom Totem Pack for New Era SMP
body:
**New Era Totems**

This pack allows you to have custom player totems of the New Era SMP members by renaming your totem to the player's username.

![Totem Rename](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ac32de4941e5daf4c82b1429a4b7989665cbe47.png)

The totems will also sit on your shoulder in 3rd person.

![Totem in 3rd person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2189649a749414dbd99c3c66396cb36db4116d2_0.webp)

ENJOY!
